title: ilex georgei
intro: Ilex georgei is a species of holly tree native to China, characterized by its glossy leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ilex georgei include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and supporting immune system function. Ilex georgei can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusement, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
